attributes.title: 捨てる
attributes.meaning: to throw away, to cast away, to dump, to discard

attributes.title: 住む
attributes.meaning: to live (of humans), to reside, to inhabit, to dwell, to abide

attributes.title: 着る
attributes.meaning: to wear (in modern Japanese, from the shoulders down), to put on

attributes.title: 始まる
attributes.meaning: to begin, to start, to commence

attributes.title: 言う
attributes.meaning: to say, to utter, to declare

attributes.title: 冷たい
attributes.meaning: cold (to the touch), chilly, icy, freezing

attributes.title: 会う
attributes.meaning: to meet, to encounter, to see

attributes.title: 習う
attributes.meaning: to take lessons in, to be taught, to learn (from a teacher), to study (under a teacher), to get training in

attributes.title: 使う
attributes.meaning: to use (a thing, method, etc.), to make use of, to put to use

attributes.title: 大学
attributes.meaning: post-secondary education institution, incl. university, college, etc.

attributes.title: 作る
attributes.meaning: to make, to produce, to manufacture, to build, to construct
